title: Gitlabs: INGV, Spacemanic, Squeezer-software ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] Gitlabs: INGV, Spacemanic, Squeezer-software is a conglomerate of three diverse specialty companies. INGV, the Italian National Institute for Geophysics and Volcanology, focuses on scientific research in earth sciences. Spacemanic is a Slovak company specializing in the production of small and nano-satellites. Squeezer offers a decentralized platform for multi-cloud and blockchain deployment, aiding developers in cloud apps production.
